subcodes.first_line: The Day of God hath indeed come, and the Calamity standeth at the gate. The dominion belongeth unto God, the Lord of Lords. Verily, they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی یوم الله و القارعه قامت لدی الباب و الملک لله رب الارباب ان الذین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
